build.buildCommand: if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then python -m pip install -r requirements.txt; elif [ -f backend/requirements.txt ]; then python -m pip install -r backend/requirements.txt; else echo 'requirements.txt not found' && exit 1; fi

deploy.startCommand: if [ -d backend ]; then cd backend; elif [ ! -d app ]; then echo 'backend app directory not found' && exit 1; fi; python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${PORT:-8000}
